MS Kathmandu NAK 5-333, Uttaratantra, Daśaka (adhyāyas 58-38-66) [post correctionem]
The Nepalese Version of the Suśrutasaṃhitā: Uttaratantra, the final Daśaka (adhyāyas 58-38-66)

revisionDesc.change: Added draft chapters of all remaining adhyāyas based on K. Cleaned up the files, removing transcription codes.
Split the uttaratantra files from 31-end into 31-44 and 45-66. Updated all the file and folder names accordingly.

We copied chapter xml:id 6.24 "pratiśyāya" from provisional-edition_uttaratantra-01-30.txt to this file, provisional-edition_uttaratantra-45-66.txt, between svaropaghāta and krimi (xml:id 53 and 54). This is the position of the pratiśyāya chapter in the Nepalese MSS.
Added draft chapters of all remaining adhyāyas based on K. Cleaned up the files, removing transcription codes.
Split the uttaratantra files from 31-end into 31-44 and 45-66. Updated all the file and folder names accordingly.
Put caesuras after each lable, for clarity when reading on screen.
Added draft chapters of all remaining adhyāyas based on K. Cleaned up the files, removing transcription codes.
Split the uttaratantra files from 31-end into 31-44 and 45-66. Updated all the file and folder names accordingly.

We copied chapter xml:id 6.24 "pratiśyāya" from provisional-edition_uttaratantra-01-30.txt to this file, provisional-edition_uttaratantra-45-66.txt, between svaropaghāta and krimi (xml:id 53 and 54). This is the position of the pratiśyāya chapter in the Nepalese MSS.

Restructuring of the Uttaratantra xml files. The xml files are now divided according to the internal naming of the sections, Śālākyatantra (adhyāyas 1-26), Kumāratantra (27-38), Kāyacikitsātantra (39-59), Bhūtavidyātantra (60-62), Tantrabhūṣaṇādhyāya (63-66).

More restructuring of the Uttaratantra xml files in line with the manuscript colophons and verse SS.SS.6.66.17ii. The final ten xml files are now brought together as a single group, combining the last 3 adhyāyas of the vulgate's Kāyacikitsātantra and all of the vulgate's Bhūtavidyātantra (60-62) and Tantrabhūṣaṇādhyāya (63-66).
Fixed alignment problems and updated the trailers

div.head: [Adhyāya 58: draft edition based on MS K]
div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.1
athāto mūtradoṣapratiṣedham vyākhyāsyāmaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.2.i
āmādhyaśanaśīlasya kaphapittapradūṣitaṃ |
srotobhir bastim āgamya mūtraṃ vyāpādayed atha |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.2.ii
vivarṇṇam āvilaṃ sāṃdraṃ kṛcchrād api ca tad bhavet |
tato vegapratīghātād udāvarttena vāyunā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.3
prapīḍyaśoṣyamāne tu mūtrarogās tadudbhavāḥ |
vātakuṇḍalikāṣṭhīlā vātabastis tathaiva ca |
mūtrātītaḥ sajaṭharo mūtrotsaṅgaḥ | || kṣayas tathā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.4
mūtragranthir mūtraśukro mūtravātas tathaiva ca |
mūtraukasādau dvau cāpi rogā dvādaśa kīrttitāḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.5
raukṣyād vegavighātād vā vāyur vastau savedanaḥ |
mūtram āvadhyaviguṇo bhramaty ākuṇḍalīkṛtaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.6
mūtram alpālpam atha vā sarujaṃ saṃpravarttate ||
vātakuṇḍalikāṃ taṃ tu vyādhim vidyāt sudāruṇaṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.7
śakṛnmārgasya basteś ca vāyur antaram āśritaḥ |
aṣṭhīlāvadghanaṃ granthiṃ karoty acalam unnataṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.8
vinmūtranilasaṃgaś ca tatrādhmānañ ca jāyate |
vātāṣṭhīleti tām āhur vyādhiṃ vyādhiviśāradāḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.9
vegaṃ vidhārayed yas tu mūtrasya kuśalo naraḥ |
niruṇaddhi mukhaṃ tasya baster bastigato nilaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.10
mūtrasaṅgo bhavet tena bastikukṣinipīḍanaḥ |
vātabastiḥ sa vijñeyo vyādhiḥ kṛcchraprasādhanaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.11
sandhārya vegaṃ mūtrasya bhūyo yaḥ sraṣṭum icchati |
tasya nābhyeti yadi vā kathaṃ cit saṃpravarttate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.12
pravāhato mandarujam alpam alpaṃ punaḥ punaḥ |
mūtrātītaṃ tu taṃ vidyān mūtravegavighātajaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.13
mūtrasya vege vihate tad udāvarttasaṃjñitaṃ ||
apānaḥ kupito vāyur udaraṃ pūrayed bhṛṣaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.14
nābher adhastād ādhmānaṃ janayet tīvravedanaṃ |
taṃ mūtrajaṭharam vidyād adho bastinirodhaṇaṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.15
bastau vāpy atha nāle maṇau vā yasya dehinaḥ |
mūtraṃ pravṛttaṃ sajjota saraktaṃ vā pravāhataḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.16
sravec chanair alpam alpaṃ sarujaṃ vātha vārujam |
viguṇānilajo vyādhir mūtrotsaṃgaḥ sa saṃjñitaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.17
rūkṣasya klāntadehasya kukṣau tiṣṭhaṃ sadāgatiḥ |
sadāhavedane kuryāt sukṛcchramūtrasaṃkṣayaṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.22
vyāyāmādhvātapaiḥ pittaṃ bastiṃ prāpyānilāvṛtaṃ |
bastiṃ meḍhraṃ gudaṃ caiva pradahaṃ srāvayed adhaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.23
mūtraṃ hāridram athavā saraktaṃ raktam eva vā |
kṛcchrāt punaḥ punar jantor uṣṇavātaṃ vadanti taṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.18
abhyantare bastimukhe vṛtto lpasthiram eva ca |
vedanāvānati sadā mūtramārganirodhakaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.19
jāyate yasya sahasā graṃthir asmarilakṣaṇaḥ |
sa mūtragranthir ity evam ucyate vedanādibhiḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.20
pratyupasthitamūtras tu maithunaṃ yo bhinandati |
tasya mūtrayuto retaḥ sahasā saṃpravarttate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.21
purastād vāpi mūtrasya paścād vāpi kadā canaḥ ||
bhasmodakapratīkāśaṃ mūtraśukraṃ tad ucyate ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.24
viśadaṃ pītakaṃ mūtraṃ sadāha bahalaṃ tathā |
śuṣkaṃ bhavati yac cāpi rocanācūrṇṇasannibhaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.25
mūtrokasādaṃ tam vidyād rogam pittakṛtam bhiṣak ||
picchilaṃ saṃhataṃ śvetaṃ tathā kṛcchraṃ pravarttate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.26
śuṣkam bhavati yac cāpi śaṃkhacūrṇṇaprapāṇḍuraṃ |
mūtraukasādaṃ taṃ vidyād rogaṃ dvādaśakaṃ kaphāt ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.27
kaṣāyacūrṇṇasarpīṃṣi kalkāṃ lehāṃ payāṃsi ca |
kṣāramadyāsavasvedaṃ bastiṃ cottarasaṃjñitāṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.28
vidadhyān matimān tatra samīkṣyāśmarisādhanaṃ |
mūtrodāvarttakayogāṃś ca kārtsnyenehopayojayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.29
kalkam ervārubījānām akṣamātraṃ sasaindhavaṃ |
dhānyāmblayuktaṃ pītvaiva mūtrakṛcchrāt pramucyate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.30
surāṃ sauvarcalavatīṃ mūtrakṛcchrī pibet naraḥ |
madhuṃ māṃsopadaṃśam vā pibed vāpy atha gauḍikaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.31
pibet kuṃkumakarṣam vā madhūdakasamāyutaṃ |
rātriparyuṣitaṃ prātas tathā sukham avāpnuyāt |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.32
dāḍimāṃmblatāṃ mukhyām elājīrakanāgaraiḥ |
pītvā surāṃ salavaṇāṃ mūtrakṛcchrāt pramucyate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.33
pṛthakparṇyādivargañ ca mūlaṃ gokṣurakasya ca |
ardhaprasthena toyasya pacet kṣīrañ caturguṇaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.34
kṣīrāvaśiṣṭaṃn tatpūtaṃ sarpiṣā saha yojitaṃ |
pibet kṣīran tatas tan tu mūtrakṛcchraharan naraḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.35
śakṛt kharasya sampīḍya śakṛd vāpy atha vājinaḥ |
rasasya tasya kuḍavaṃ piben mūtrarujāpahaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.36
mustābhayādevadārumūrvāṇām madhukasya ca |
pibed akṣasamaṃ kalkaṃ mūtradoṣanivāraṇaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.37
abhayāmalakākṣāṇāṃ kalkaṃ badarasammitaṃ |
sahāmbhasā salavaṇaṃ piben mūtrarujāpahan |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.38
udumbarasamaṅ kalkaṃ drākṣāyā jalasaṃyutaṃ |
pibet paryuṣitaṃ rātrau śītaṃ mūtrarujāpahaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.39
nidigdhikāyāḥ svarasaṃ pibet kuḍavasaṃmitaṃ |
mūtradoṣaharaṃ kālyam atha vā kṣaudrasaṃyutaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.40
prapīḍyāmalakānāṃ tu rasaṃ kuḍavasaṃmmitaṃ |
pītvāgadībhavej jantur mūtradoṣarujāturuḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.41
dhātrīphalarasenaiva sūkṣmelām vā piben naraḥ |
tasyālābhe suśītena svetataṇḍulavāriṇā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.42
tālasya taruṇam mūlaṃ trapusasya rasaṃ tathā |
svetakarkaṭakaś caiva prātas tu payasā pibet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.43
sritam vā madhuraiḥ kṣīraṃ sarpirmiśram piben naraḥ |
mūtradoṣaviśudhyarthaṃ śukradoṣaharaṃ śivaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.44
balāśvadaṃṣṭrāṃ krauñcāsthikokilākṣakataṇḍulāṃ |
śataparvakamūlañ ca devadāru sacitraṃkaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.45
akṣabījañ ca surayā kalkīkṛtya piben naraḥ |
mūtradoṣaviśuddhyarthaṃ tathaivāśmaribhedanaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.58.46
pāṭalākṣaram āhṛtya saptakṛtvaḥ parisrutaṃ |
pibet mūtravikāraghnaṃ saṃsṛṣṭan tailamātrayeti || ❈ ||
kāyaci || 21 || ❈ ||

div.head: [Adhyāya 59: draft edition based on MS K]
div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.1
athāto mūtrāghātapratiṣedhaṃ vyāvyākhyāsyāmaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.1.1
yadā mūtrayato jantoḥ mūtravego vihanyate |
mūtrāghātaṃ vadanty etam aṣṭadhā sa tu vakṣyate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.3
vātena pittena kaphena sarvais tathābhighātaiḥ śakṛdaśmaribhyāṃ |
tathāparaḥ śarkarayā sukaṣṭo mūtropaghātaḥ paṭhito 'ṣṭamas tu |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.4
alpam alpaṃ bhṛśaṃpīḍya muṣkamehanabastibhiḥ
saṃtudyamānaḥ kṛcchreṇa vātāghātena mehate ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.5
pītam vāpy atha vā raktaṃ muṣkamehanabastibhir
agnineva ca dahṛmbhiḥ pittāghātena mehate ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.6
samunnaddhodaraḥ kṛcchrān muṣkamehanabastibhiḥ |
saṃhṛṣṭaromā gurubhiḥ śleṣmāghātena mehate ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.7
dāhaśītarujāviṣṭo nānāvarṇṇam muhur muhus
tāmyamānaḥ sa kṛcchreṇa sannipātena mehate ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.8
mūtravāhiṣu śalyena kṣateṣv abhihateṣu vā |
srotaḥsu mūtrāghātas tu jāyate bhṛṣadāruṇaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.9
vātāghātena liṅgāni tasya tulyāni nirddiśet ||
śakṛtas tu pratīghātād vāyur viguṇatāṃ gataḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.10
sādhmānañ ca samūlañ ca mūtrasaṅgaṃ karoti ca ||
aśmarīsambhavasyoktaṃ mūtraghātasya lakṣaṇaṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.11
aśmarī śarkarā caiva śṛṇu kīrttayato mamaḥ |
śarkarāyā viśeṣan tu śṛṇu kīrttayato mama |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.12
pacyamānaṃ tu pittena śoṣyamānan tu vāyunā |
śleṣmaṇā veṣṭitaṃ cūrṇṇaṃ śarkarety abhisañjñitaṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13
hṛtpīḍā vepathuḥ śūlaḥ kukṣāv agniś ca durbalaḥ |
tābhir bhavati mūrcchā ca mūtrāghātaś ca dāruṇaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13i
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi mūtrāghātacikitsitaṃ |
kāryaṃ bhaved yathā yac ca śṛṇu kīrttayato mama ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13ii
kaṣāyāny tha kalkāś ca lehāḥ svedās tathaiva ca |
hitā syur mūtraghāteṣu tathaivottarabastayaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13iii
ervvārubījakalkaḥ syāc chlakṣṇapiṣṭaukṣasammitaḥ |
dhānyāmlbapeyo lavaṇo mūtrāghātena pīḍitaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13iv
surāṃ sauvarcalavatīm pradhānāṃ prapiben naraḥ |
jīrṇṇabhuktaḥ sadā bhuñjaṃ saguḍaṃ śāntim arcchati |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13v
madhūdakena saṃloḍya karṣaṃ kuṃkumakasya vā |
rātrau paryuṣitam pūtaṃ piben mūtrarujāpahaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13vi
dāḍimāṃmblayutaṃ madyaṃ śuṇṭhījīrakasaṃyutaṃ |
pītvā surāṃ salavaṇāṃ mūtrakṛcchrāt pramucyate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13vii
pṛthakparṇyādivargañ ca svadaṃṣṭrāñ caiva tatsamaṃ |
ardhaprasthena dugdhasya paced ardhāḍhakodake |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13viii
kṣīrāvaśiṣṭam āhṛtya pūtaṃ sarpir vidhūpitaṃ |
śītīkṛtaṃ pibed enaṃ mūtrakṛcchraharan naraḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13ix
gardasya śakṛd vāpi vājināṃ vā gavāṃ tathā |
rasasya tasya kuḍavaṃ piben mūtrarujāpahaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13x
haridrāṃ madhukaṃ mūrvāṃ mustakaṃ devadāru ca |
pibed akṣasamāṃ kalkāṃ payasā mūtrapīḍitaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xi
triphalāṃ śūkṣmapiṣṭaṃ vā kalkaṃ badarasammitaṃ |
vāriṇā lavaṇīkṛtya piben mūtrarujāpahaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xii
drākṣārasasya kuḍavaṃ piben mūtrarujāharaṃ |
nidigdhikāyāḥ svarasaṃ pūtaṃ kuḍavasammitaṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xiii
mūtradoṣaharam pītvā naraḥ sampadyate sukhī ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xiv
prapīḍyāmalakānām vā rasaṃ kuḍavasammitaṃ |
pītvāgadībhavej jantur mūtradoṣeṇa pīḍitaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xv
mūtradoṣe pibed vāpi hiṃgvelāpānasaṃyutā |
pānālābhe hitam vāpi svetataṇḍudhāvanaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xvi
elāhiṃguyutaṃ kṣīraṃ sarpirmiśram piben naraḥ |
mūtradoṣo viśudhyarthaṃ śukradoṣaharañ ca tat |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xvii
palāśakṣāram āhṛtya saptakṛtvāpariśrutaṃ |
pāyayet tailasaṃsṛṣṭaṃ mūtradoṣeṇa pīḍitaṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xviii
adhyardhaprasṛtaṃ vāpi tathā sa labhate sukhaṃ |
pāṭalīkṣāram āhṛtya palāśakṣāravac ca taṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xix
vilvasiṃhīyavanāḍaṃ palāśaḥ pāribhadrakaḥ |
eṣāṃ kṣāram parisrāvya surayā saha saṃsṛjet ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xx
tatra kalkān imāṃ dadyād badarāsthisamanvitāṃ ||
varāṃgamūṣakāṇy elā ślakṣṇaṃ dṛśadi pīṣayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xxi
ekatraitat samāloḍya pibec charkarayā saha |
eteṣv eva pacet sarpis taṃ lihen madhunā saha |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.13xxii
saguḍakṣārasaṃyuktaṃ mūtrakṛcchrāt pramucyate ||
etat sarvaṃ prayoktavyaṃ mūtrāghāte vijānatā ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.14
mūtradoṣeṣu kṛcchreṣu tena sampadyate gadaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.16
aśmarīśarkarāhetoḥ pūrvam uktaṃ cikitsitaṃ |
prasamīkṣya yathānyāyaṃ bhiṣak tān api yojayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.17
śvadaṃṣṭrāditaṭekuñci hapuṣāṃ kaṇṭakārikāṃ |
kālāṃ śatāvarīṃ rāsnāṃ varuṇaṃ sirivālikāṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.18
vidārigandhādi saṃhṛtya tābhiḥ sa tṛvṛtāṃ pibet ||
tailaṃ ghṛtaṃ vā tat peyaṃ tena vāpy anuvāsanaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.19
dadyād uttarabastiñ ca vātakṛcchropaśāntaye ||
svadaṃṣṭrāsvarase tailaṃ saguḍakṣīranāgaraṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.20
paktvā samyak pibet tac ca dadyād anilaruggharaṃ |
utpalaṃ tṛṇakākolīnyagrodhādīgaṇe kṛtaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.21
pītaṃ ghṛtaṃ pittakṛcchraṃ nāśayet kṣīram eva vā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.22
ebhir eva kṛtaṃ snehaṃ trividheṣv eva bastiṣu |
hitaṃ virecanaṃ cekṣukṣīradrākṣārasair yutaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.23
rasaṃ mauṣakamustādi varuṇādau ca saṃbhṛtaṃ |
tailaṃ tathā yavāgvādi kaphāghāte praśasyate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.24
yathādoṣocchrayaṃ kuryād etām eva ca sarvaje |
phalguvṛścikadarbhāśmasāracūrṇṇaṃ ca vāriṇā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.25
surekṣurasadarbhāmbupītaṃ kṛcchrarujāpahaṃ |
tathābhighātaje kuryāt sadyo vraṇacikitsitaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.26
mūtrakṛcchre sadā cāsya kāryā vā vātikī kriyā ||
svedāvagāhāvabhyaṃgaḥ basticūrṇṇakriyās tathā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.59.27
sakṛjje vā tathānyau tu muddhiṣṭau kriyāvidhīti ||
kāyaci || 22 || 0 ||

div.head: [Adhyāya 58 (Kāyacikitsā 23), Adhyāya 38 in the vulgate: draft edition based on MS K]
div.note: From here down to the end of 6.38.4 is mostly the text of KL 699, with critical editing ongoing
div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.1
athāto yonivyāpatpratiṣedhaṃ vyākhyāsyāmaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.3.add
paraḥ sukhārthaḥ pramadā supuṃsāṃ
yasmād ato yonigatān vikārān |
yatnena vaidyaḥ samupakrameta
yasmāt sukhārthan tadadhīna eva ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.4.add
yoniḥ praduṣṭā grasate na śukraṃ
garbhan na gṛhṇāti tataś ca nārī |
arśāṃsi gulmaṃ pravaraṃ prabhūtāṃ
prāpnoti rogān vividhāṃs tathānyān ||[]

list.note: The following are testimonia to the vulgate verses below missing in the Nepalese transmission.
list.item: Carakasaṃhitā 6.30.7ab--8cd: viṃśatir vyāpado yoner nirdiṣṭā rogasaṃgrahe || mithyācāreṇa tāḥ strīṇāṃ praduṣṭenārtavena ca | jāyante bījadoṣāc ca daivāc ca śṛṇu tāḥ pṛthak ||
Mādhavanidāna 62.1-2ab: viṃśatir vyāpado yonau nirdiṣṭā rogasaṃgrahe | mithyācāreṇa tāḥ strīṇāṃ praduṣṭenārtavena ca || jāyante bījadoṣāc ca daivāc ca śṛṇu tāḥ pṛthak |

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.5.add
mithyopacārāt suratakriyāyā
daivāt tathā cārttavabījadoṣāt |
doṣāḥ praduṣṭāḥ pavanādayas tu
yonyāṃ vicitrān janayanti rogān |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.6.add
te viṃśatir bheṣajahetucihnair
ihopadiṣṭāḥ pṛthag ekaśaś ca ||
udāvarttā vandhyasañjñā plutā ca
pariplutā vātalā ceti vātāt |

list.item: The preceding three hemistichs in upajāti (mithyopacārāt ... ekaśaś ca) correspond to four hemistichs in anuṣṭubh of the vulgate (4cd--6ab).
Three of the four hemistichs found in the vulgate (5ab--6ab) are repeated verbatim in Mādhavanidāna 62.1ab-2ab.

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.7.add
raktakṣayā vāminī sraṃsanī ca
putraghny atho pittalā caiva pittāt ||
atyānandā karṇṇinī dve caraṇyau
bhaved anyā śleṣmalā śleṣmaṇā ca |

list.item: The preceding two hemistichs in triṣṭubh correspond to three hemistichs in anuṣṭubh of the vulgate (6cd--7cd).

The reading karṇṇinī is not supported by our MSS here. However, it is found in both the parallel verse of the vulgate (6.38.8ab) and at a later instance in the Nepalese MSS (see, e.g., verse 12 below). It is likely that the superscipt "r" in the reading of KL 699 (karṇṇirna) reflects upon an earlier corruption of an "i".

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.8.add
śaṇḍhy aṇḍinī mahatī sūcīvaktrā
sarvātmikā sarvadoṣās tathānyā ||

list.item: The preceding two hemistichs in triṣṭubh correspond to three hemistichs in anuṣṭubh of the vulgate (8ab-9ab).

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.9
saphenilam udāvarttā rajaḥ kṛcchreṇa muñcati |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.10
vandhyām anārttavāṃ vidyād utplutāṃ nityavedanām |
pariplutāyāṃ bhavati grāmyadharmarucir bhṛśaṃ ||

list.item: Madhukośa to Mādhavanidāna 62.4: ‘grāmyadharmeṇa rug bhṛśām’ ity atra ‘grāmyadharme rucir’ iti pāṭhāntaraṃ, tatra rucir abhilāṣaḥ, grāmyadharme maithune
pariplutāyāṃ bhavati is a correct na-Vipulā.

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.11
vātalā karkaśā stabdhā śūlanistodapīḍitā |
catasṛṣv api cādyāsu bhavanty anilavedanāḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.12
sadāhaṃ kṣīyate raktaṃ yasyāḥ sā lohitakṣayā |
srutāv apy udgired bījaṃ vāminī rajasā plutā |

list.item: Mādhavanidāna 62.5ab: sadāhaṃ kṣīyate raktaṃ yasyāṃ sā lohitākṣayā
Dalhaṇa to Ut.38.12: `sadāhaṃ kṣīyate raktaṃ yasyāṃ sā lohitākṣayā' iti kecit paṭhanti |

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.13
prasraṃsanī saṃsraṃsate kṣobhitā duḥprajāyinī |
sthitaṃ sthitaṃ hanti garbhaṃ putraghnī raktavisravaiḥ |

list.item: Ḍalhaṇa at SS.6.38.13: ‘duḥprasūś ca’ ity atrānye ‘duḥprajāyanā’ iti paṭhanti, duṣṭībhūtāpatyamārgeti vyākhyānayanti|
Mādhavanidāna 64.6ab: prasraṃsinī sraṃsate ca kṣobhitā duṣprajāyinī

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.14
atyarthaṃ pittalā yonir dāhapākasamanvitā |
catasṛṣv api cādyāsu pittaliṅgāni yojayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.15
atyānandād asantoṣād grāmyadharme 'dhigacchati |
karṇṇinyāṃ karṇṇikā yonau śleṣmāsṛgbhyāṃ tu jāyate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.16
maithune caraṇī pūrvā puruṣāt sātiricyate |
bahuśaś cāticaraṇāt tato bījaṃ na tiṣṭhati |

list.item: Ḍalhaṇa at SS.6.38.15-17: anye ‘maithune 'caraṇā pūrvaṃ’ iti paṭhanti, śeṣaṃ samam |
Ḍalhaṇa at SS.6.38.15-17: ‘bahuśaś cāticaraṇī tayor bījaṃ na tiṣṭḥati’ iti kecit paṭhanti |

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.17
śleṣmalā picchilā yoniḥ kaṇḍūgrastātiśītalā |
catasṛṣv api cādyāsu kaphaliṅgāni yojayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.18
naṣṭārttavastanaḥ ṣaṇḍhyāṃ kharasparśā ca maithune ||
atikāyagṛhītāyās taruṇyā aṇḍanī bhavet |

list.item: Mādhavanidāna 62.11cd: atikāyagṛhītāyās taruṇyās tv aṇḍalī bhavet | Here, the edition reports a reading of the MS ‘ka’: aṇḍinī

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.19
vivṛtā tu mahāyoniḥ sūcīvaktrātisaṃvṛtā |
sarvaliṅgasamutthānāṃ sarvadoṣasamanvitā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.20
catasṛṣv api cādyāsu sarvaliṅganidarśanam |
pañcāsādhyā bhavantīmā vyādhayaḥ sarvadoṣajāḥ |

list.item: Bhāvaprakāśa Ma Ci 70.16cd: catasṛṣv api cādyāsu sarvaliṅganidarśanam ||

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.21
pratidoṣaṃ tu sādhyāsu snehādikrama iṣyate |
dadyād uttarabastīś ca viśeṣeṇa yatheritaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.22
karkaśāṃ śītalāṃ stabdhām alpasparśān tathaiva ca |
kumbhīsvedair yojayīta sānūpodakasaṃyutaiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.23
madhurauṣadhasaṃyuktān veśavārāṃś ca yoniṣu |
nikṣiped dhārayeyuś ca balātailam alaṃ śanaiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.24
dhāvanāni ca pathyāni kurvīta vamanāni ca |
ūṣācoṣānviteṣūktaṃ kuryāc chītavidhiṃ bhiṣak |

list.item: SS.Ci.2.22 in NAK 5-333 ūṣāsrāvānvitan tan tu ghṛṣṭam ity abhidhīyate ||

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.25
durgandhāṃ picchilām vāpi cūrṇṇaiḥ pañcakaṣāyajaiḥ |
pūrayed rājavṛkṣādikaṣāyañ cātra śodhanaṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.26
yonikrimiprabandhāṃ tu śodhanadravyasaṃyutaiḥ |
sagomūtraiḥ salavaṇaiḥ kalkair āpūrayec chanaiḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.27
bṛhatīphalakalkair vā tadambupariśodhitā |
sakaṇḍūrāṃ tu nisparśāṃ pūrayed dhūpayec ca tām |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.28
karṇṇinyāṃ varttayo deyāḥ śodhanadravyasaṃyutāḥ |
prasraṃsinīṃ ghṛtābhyaktāṃ kṣīraṃ svinnā praveśayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.29
pidhāya veśavāraiś ca tato bandhaṃ samācaret |
pratidoṣaṃ nidadhyāc ca †surāriṣṭasamāṃ† bhiṣak |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.30cd
kṣīramāṃsarasaprāyam āhāraṃ vidadhīta ca |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.31
śukrārttavastanyadoṣā rasadoṣāś ca kīrttitāḥ |
klaibyasthānāni mūḍhasya garbhasya vidhir eva ca ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.38.32
garbhiṇīṃ prati rogeṣu cikitsā cāpy udīritā |
anuprajāta rogāṃś ca cikitsed uttarān bhiṣak ||
iti ||
div.note: The Nepalese MSS do not follow the sequence of the vulgate here. The Nepalese edition should follow the Nepalese MSS, i.e., vulgate 6.38 is followed by 6.60

div.head: [Adhyāya 60: draft edition based on MS K]
div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.1
athāto mānuṣapratiṣedhaṃ vyākhyāsyāmaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.2
yathovāca bhagavān dhanvantariḥ śṛṇu vatsa suśruta ||

list.item: One of the only two places in the Nepalese version where this yathovāca phrase appears. The other is Suśrutasaṃhitā 5.1.2. At that location, a scribe of witness H added the marginal phrase atha khalu vatsasuśrutaḥ.

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.3
niśācarebhyo rakṣyas tu nityam eva kṣatāturaḥ |
iti yat prāgabhihitaṃ vistaran tasya vakṣyate ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.4
grahāṇyaṃ gativijñānam anavasthāsahiṣṇutā |
kriyāś cāmānuṣī yasmiṃ sagrahaḥ parikīrttitā ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.5
aśucibhinnamayādakṣata taṃ |
hiṃsyur hiṃsāvihārārthaṃ satkārārtham athāpi vā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.6
asaṃkhyeyāṃ grahāṇyas ttu grahādhipatayas tu ye ||
vyañjānte vividhākārā bhidyante te tathāṣṭadhā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.7
devās ca devārigaṇyas tathaiva gandharvayakṣāḥ pitaro bhujaṅgāḥ |
rakṣāṃsi yā cāpi piśācahātireṣoṣṭako devagaṇyai grahaukhyaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.8
saṃtuṣṭaḥ sucira vina ṣṭagandhamālyau nistandrīr avitathasaṃskṛtābhilāpī |
tejasvī sthitanayano varapradātā brahmaṇyau bhavati ca rudradevajuṣṭaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.9
saṃsvedīṃ dvijagurudevadoṣavaktā jihmākṣo vigatabhayo vimārgadṛṣṭiḥ |
saṃtuṣṭo bhavati na cānnapānahātairdraṣṭātmā bhavati ca devaśatrujuṣṭaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.10
hṛṣṭātmā pulinavanāntaropasevī svācāraḥ parigatagandhamālyapaḥ |
nṛttādyaiḥ prahasati cāru cālpaśabdaṃ gandharvagrahaparipīḍito manuṣyaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.11
tāmrākṣaḥ priyatanuraktavastradhārī gambhīro drutagatiralpavāk sahiṣṇuḥ ||
tejasvī vadati ca kim dadāmi kasmai yo yakṣagrahaparipīḍito manuṣyaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.12
pretānāṃ nipatati saṃstareṣu piṇḍāṃ śāntātmā jalam api cāpasavyahastaḥ |
māṃsepsustilakṛtapāyasābhikāmastadbhakṣo bhavati pitṛgrahābhijuṣṭaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.13
yastūrvyā prasarati sarpavat kadācit sṛkvaṇyau vilihati jihvayā tathaiva ||
krordhārttoguḍaṃmadhudugdhapāyasepsurvijñeyo bhavati bhujaṅgamagra hārttaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.14
māṃsāsṛgvividhasurāvikāralipsurnirlajjo bhṛśamatiniṣṭhuro tiśūraḥ |
krodhārtto vipulabalo niśāvihārī | śaucadviḍ bhavati sa rakṣasā gṛhītaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.15
udhdhastaḥ kṛśaparuṣaś cirapralāpī durgandho bhṛśamaśucistathātilolaḥ |
bahvāśī vijanahimāṃburātrisevī vyācaṣṭaṃ bhramati rudan piśācajuṣṭaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.16
sthūlākṣo drutagamanaḥ saphenalehī niṣceṣṭaḥ patati ca vepatethayāti |
yaś cādridviradanagādivicyutaḥ saṃ saṃhṛṣṭo bhavati sahagrahābhijuṣṭaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.17
devagrahāḥ paurṇṇāmāsyāmāsurāḥ sandhyayor api |
gandhayāḥ prāyaśoṣṭamyāṃ yakṣāś ca pratipatha |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.18
kṛṣṇakṣaye ca pitaraḥ paṇcamyām api coragāḥ |
rakṣāṃsi rātrau paiśācāś carturdaśyāṃ viśaṃti hi ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.19
darpaṇyadīn yathā cchāyā śītoṣṇaṃ prāṇino yathā |
mayo bhāskarārcīṃṣi tathā dehaṃ ca dehadhṛk |
viśanti na ca dṛśyante grahāstadvaccharīriṇam ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.20
tapāṃsi tīvrāṇi tathaiva dānaṃ vratāni dharmo niyataś ca satyaṃ |
grahāstathāṣṭāvapi teṣu nityaṃ vyastāḥ samastāś ca yathāprabhāvaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.21
na te manuṣyaiḥ saha saṃviśanti na vā manuṣyāṃ kvacidāviśanti |
ye tvāviśantīti vadanti mmūhās te bhūtasargād viṣayādvyapoḍhā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.22
teṣāṃ grahāṇāṃ paricārakā ye koṭīsahasrāyutapadmasaṃkhyāḥ |
asṛgvasāmāṃsabhujaḥ subhīmā niśācarāś cāpi tam āviśanti |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.23
niśācarāṇān teṣāṃ hi ye devagaṇasaṃrśritāḥ |
te tu tat satvasaṃsargāsmaddhruttās tu tad añjanāḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.24
devagrahā iti khyātāḥ procyante śucayas tu te |
devavac ca namasyante pravarttante ca devavat |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.25
svāmiśīlapriyācārāḥ krama eṣa surādiṣu |
nirṛteryā duhitarastāṃsāṃ sa prabhavaḥ smṛtaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.26
sanyāso satpravṛtteṣu vṛttiteṣāṃ gaṇaiḥ kṛtāḥ |
hiṃsāvihārā ye kecid divyam bhāvānapāśritāḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.27
bhūtānīti kṛtā saṃjña teṣāṃ bhūtapravaktṛbhiḥ |
grahasañjñāni bhūtāni tasmād budhyaitayo bhiṣak ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.28
vidyayā bhūtavaidyatvamatan tv evaṃ nirucyate |
teṣāṃ śānty atham anvicchan vaidyas tu susamāhitaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.29
japyaiḥ saniyamaidhīmān ārabheta kicitsituṃ |
raktāni gandhamālyāni bījāni madhusarpiṣī |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.30
bhakṣyāś ca sarve sarveṣāṃ sāmānyo vidhirucyate ||
vastrāṇi madyamāṃsāni kṣīrāṇi rudhirāṇi ca |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.31
yāni yeṣāṃ yatheṣṭāni tāni teṣāṃ pradāpayet |
hiṃsanti manujāṃ yeṣu prāyaśo divaseṣu tu |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.32
devagrahe devagṛhe hutvāgniṃ prāpayed baliṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.33
kuśasvastikapūpājyacchatrapāyasasaṃyutaṃ |
āsure tu yathākālaṃ vidadhyāc catvarādiṣu |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.34
gandharvasya gavāṃ mārge maṃdyamāṃsāṃ bujākulaṃ |
hṛdye veśmani yakṣasya kulmāṣāsṛksurādibhiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.35ab
atimuktakacampādyaiḥ puṣpaiś ca vitared baliṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.36
catuṣpathai rākṣasasya bhīmeṣu gahaneṣu vā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.37ab
śūnyālaye piśācasya cītraṃ balimupāharet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.38
na śakyā balinā yetu yogaistāṃ samupācaret |
janvṛkṣacarmaromāṇi śalyakālasunan tathā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.39
hiṃgu mūtrañ ca bastasya dhūpamasmai pradāpayet |
etena śāmyati kṣipraṃ balavānapi yo grahaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.40
gajāhvāpippalīmūlaṃ vyoṣāmalakasarṣapān |
godhānakulamārjāraruṣapittaprapeṣimān|

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.41ab
nasyābhyañjanasekeṣu vidadhyād yogatatvavit ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.35cd
nadyāṃ pitṛgrahāyaṣṭaṃ kuśāsuraṇa bhūṣitaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.36ab
tatraivopaharec cāpi nāgāya vividhād baliṃ |||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.41cd
svarāśvāśvatarolūkakarabhaśvaśṛgālajaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.42
purīśaṃ kaṃkagṛdhrābhyāṃ varāhasya ca pīṣayet |
bastamūtreṇa tatsiddhaṃ tailaṃ syāt pūrvavad dhitaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.43
śirīṣapuṣpa laśuna śuṇṭhī siddhārthakaṃ vacāṃ |
mañjiṣṭhāṃ rajanī kṛṣṇāṃ bastamūtreṇa pīṣayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.44
vartyaś chāyāviśuṣkāstāḥ sapittāt nayanāṃjanaṃ |
naktamālaphalaṃ vyoṣaṃ mūlaṃ śyonākabilvayoḥ

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.45
haridre ca kṛtā vartyaḥ pūrvavannayanañjane |
vacām api |
bastamūtreṇa piṣṭanna matsyapittena pūrvavat |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.46cd
pūrāṇasarpirlaśunaṃ hiṃgu siddhāthakaṃ vacā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.47
golomī cājalomī ca bhūtakeśī jaṭī tathā |
kukkuṭī sarpagandhā ca tiktālāvū viāṣāṇike|

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.48
vajraproktā vayasthā ca śṛṅgī mohanavalyapi ||
arkamūlaṃ trikaṭu |kaṃ tāla sroto jamañjanaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.49
naipālī haritālañ ca ra |
mārjāradvīpavājigajāṃs tathā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.50
śvāvidchālyakagodhānāṃ tathaiva nakuloṣṭrayauḥ |
vidadhītavasāmūtraṃ rattapittanakhatvacaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.51
asmin varge bhiṣak kuyāt tailāni ca ghṛtāni ca |
pānābhyañjananasyeṣu tāni yojyāni jānatā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.52
avapīḍeñjane caiva vidadhyād guḍikākṛtāṃ |
vidadhīta parīṣeke kvathitaṃ cūrṇitaṃ tathā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.53
uddhūpane ślaṣṭaṃ pradehe cāvacārayet |
eṣa sarvavikārāṃs tu mānasānavicāritaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.54
hanyādalpaina kālena snehādirapi ca kramaḥ |
na cācaukṣaṃ prayuñjīta prayogaṃ devatāgrahe |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.55
ṛte paiṣācamanyeṣāmanukūlaṃ samācaret |
vaidyāturau nihanyuste dhruvaṃ kruddhā mahaujasaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.60.56ab
hitāhitavidhānañ ca nityam eva samācared iti ||
kāyaci || ||

div.head: [Adhyāya 61: draft edition based on MS K]
div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.1
athāto pasmārapratiṣedhaṃ vyāṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.3ab
smaraṇan na bhavaty asminn āpac ca parivarjayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.3cd
apasmāra iti proktas tato yaṃ vyādhir antakṛt |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.7
hṛtkampaḥ śūnyatā svedo dhyānaṃ mūrcchā pramūḍhatā |
nidrānāśaś ca tasmiṃs ca bhaviṣyati bhavanty atha |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.8ab
saṃjñāvaheṣu srotaḥsu doṣavyāpteṣu mānavaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.9cd
dantāṃ khādaṃ vaman phenaṃ vivṛtākṣaḥ patat kṣitau |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.10cd
so pasmāra iti khyātaḥ sa ca dṛṣṭaś caturvidhaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.12
yo brūyād vikṛtaṃ satvaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ mām anudhāvati |
tato me cittanāśaḥ syāt sopasmāro nilātmakaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.13cd
yo brūyād vikṛtaṃ satvaṃ pītaṃ mām anudhāvati |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.14ab
tato me cittanāśaḥ syāt sa pittabhava ucyate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.15
yo brūyād vikṛtaṃ satvaṃ śuklaṃ mām anudhāvati |
tato me cittanāśaḥ syāt sopasmāraḥ kaphātmakaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.16
hṛdi todastṛkledastriṣvapyeteṣu saṃkhyayā |
pralāpaḥ kūjanaṃ krodhaḥ pratyekañ ca bhavanti hi |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.17
sarvaliṃgasamavāpaḥ sarvadoṣaprakopaje |
animittāgamād vyādher gamanād asṛhād api |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.18
āgamāccāpy apasmāraṃ vadantyanyo nya dūṣaṇaṃ |
kramopayogād doṣāṇyaṃ kṣaṇikatvāt tathaiva ca |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.19
āgamād vaiśvarūpyāc ca sa tu nirvalyate budhaiḥ |
deve varṣaty api yathā bhūmau bījāni kānicit |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.20
śaradi pratirohanti tathā vyādhisamucchrayaḥ |
sthāyinaḥ kecidalpena kālenābhivivadhitāḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.21
darśayanti vikārāṃstu viśvāṃ kramanisargataḥ |
apasmāro mahāvyādhistasmād doṣaja eva tu |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.22
tasya kāyo vidhiḥ sarvā unmādeṣu pravakṣyate |
purāṇasarpiṣa pānamabhyaṅge caiva pūjitaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.23ab
upayogo grahoktānāṃ yogānāṃ vāpy aśeṣataḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.23ef
bhis rukaṭvaṅgakiṇihīnimbatvagrasasādhitaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.24
caturguṇe gavāṃ mūtre tailamabhyañjane hitaṃ |
godhāṇakulanāgānāṃ vṛṣabharkṣagavān api |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.25
pitteṣu tailaṃ siddhāñ ca nasyebhyaṅge ca pūjitaṃ |
tīkṣṇair ubhayatobhāgaiḥ śirasaś ca virecanaiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.27cd
kulatthayavakolāni śarabījaṃ palaṃkaśā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.28
jaṭilāṃ pañcamūle dve pathyāni kvāthyayogataḥ |
bastamūtrayutaṃ sarpiḥ pacet tat paittike hitaṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.26cd
vātikaṃ bastibhiś cāpi paittikañ ca virecanaiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.27ab
kaphajam vamanaidhīmānapasmāramupācaret |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.38
bhārgīsiddhe pacet kṣīre śālitaṇḍulapāyasaṃ |
tryahaṃ kṣaudrayutaṃ bhoktuṃ varāhāyopakalpayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.39
jñātvā ca madhurībhrūtaṃ taṃ viśasyānnamuddharet |
trīn bhāgāṃ tasya hiṇvasya cūrbhāgena saṃsṛjet

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.40
maṇḍodakāthe deyaś ca bhārgīkvātha suśītalaḥ
śuddhe kumbhe nidadhyāc ca saṃbhāra taṃ surāt tataḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.61.41
jātagandhāṃ jātarasāṃ pāyayed āsavaṃ bhiṣak |
sirāñ ca vyadhayet prāptāṃ maṃgalyaṃ cāpi dhārayed iti ||
kāyacikitsā || ||

div.head: [Adhyāya 62: draft edition based on MS K]
div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.1
athātonmādapratiṣedhaṃ vyākhyāsyāmaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.3
madayanty uddhatā doṣā yasmād unmārgam āśritāḥ |
mānaso yamato vyādhirunmāda iti kīrtyate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.4
ekaikaśaḥ sarvaśaś ca dośairatyathamucchritaiḥ |
mānasena ca duḥkhena pañcamaś ca sa ucyate |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.5
viṣādbhavati ṣaṣṭhaś ca yathāsvaṃ tasya bheṣajaṃ |
sa tu pravṛddhastaruṇo madasaṃjñāṃ bibhartti ha |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.6
mohodvegaḥ svanaḥ śrotre gātrāṇyamapakarṣaṇaṃ |
atyutsāho ruciś cānne svapne kaluṣamajjanaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.7
vāyunonmathanaṃ cāpi bhramaś cakragatasya vā |
yasya syur acireṇaivā unmādaṃ so dhigacchati ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.8cd
āsphoṭāyatyaṭati gāyati nṛttaśīlo vikrośati bhramati cāpy anilaprakopāt |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.9cd
tīkṣṇā himāmbuni caye pi sa vahniśaṃkī pittārdito nabhasi paśyati tārakāṃś ca |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.10cd
nidrāparo lpakathato lpabhuguṣṇasevī rātrau bhṛśaṃ bhavati cāpi kaphaprakopāt |

6.62.11.add
sarvātmake tribhir api vyatimiśritāni rūpāṇi vātakaphapittakṛtāni vidyāt |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.12
cauraiḥ sarājaḥ puruṣair aribhi yathā vā vitrāsitasya dhanabāndhavasaṃkṣayād vā ||
gāḍhaṃ kṣate manasi ca priyayā riraṃsor jāyeta cotkaṭātaro manaso vikāraḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.13
citraṃ bravīti ca manonugataṃ visaṃjño gāyatyatho hasati rodati cāpi mūḍhaḥ |
raktekṣaṇai hatabalendriyavāk sudīnaḥ śyāmānano viṣakṛte na saṃjñaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.14
manujamunmādārtaṃ viśodhayet |
tīkṣṇair ubhayatobhāgaiḥ śirasaś ca virecanaiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.15ab
vividhairavapīḍaiś ca sarṣapasnehasaṃyutaiḥ|

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.15a
cūrṇṇaṃ śukyātha nāḍyā vā pradhame vvāsyatastavyoḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.16
satataṃ dhūpayec cainaṃ śvagomāṃsaistupūtibhiḥ |
sarṣapānyañ ca tailena nasyābhyaṅgai hitaḥ sadāḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.17a
ayaḥ pāśāvabaddhaś ca rajjuvyāḍāyudhādibhiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.18cd
trāsayed rakṣañ ca taṃ prasupta tṛ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.18a
jalodanāśinañ caiva śuddhe veśmani vāsayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.18b
surakṣitaṃ balavatā jale taṃ pariṣecayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.18c
gajairvinītair uragairaviṣaiś cāpi bhīṣayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.18ab
stambhāvabaddhaṃ yaṣṭībhiḥ kaśābhir vāpi tāḍayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.19ef
pratudedārayā cainaṃ marmāghātaṃ vivarjayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.20
cakrāpidhāne kūpe ca satataṃ tan nivāsayet |
tryahāt tryahād cāsmai dadyād yavāṃgūm atha tarpaṇaṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.21ab
kevalenāmbunā vāpi kulmāsām vā bahuśrutaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.30
brāhmīmendrīṃ viḍaṃgāni vyoṣa hiṃgu jaṭīsurāṃ |
rāsnāṃ viṣaghnāṃ laśunaṃ viśalyāṃ surasāṃ vacāṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.31
jyotiṣmatīn nāgavinnām anantāmabhayāt tathā |
saurāṣṭrīñ ca samāṃśāni nāgamūtreṇa pīṣayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.32
cchāyāviśuṣkāstāvartyo yojayed vidhikovidaḥ |
avapīḍe ñjane bhyaṅgo nasye dhūpe tathaiva ca |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.33
uropāṃgalalāṭoṣu sirāṃś cāsya vimokṣayet |
apasmārakriyāñ cāpi grahoddiṣṭāñ ca kārayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.34ab
śāntadoṣaṃ viśuddhaś ca snehabastibhir ācaret |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.34ef
mṛdupūrvaṃ made py evaṃ kriyāṃ mṛdvīṃ prayojayet|

cf. 1938 ed. 6.62.35ab
śokaśalyaṃ vyapanayed unmāde pañcame bhiṣagiti ||
kāyacikitsā || ||

div.head: [Adhyāya 63: draft edition based on MS K]
div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.1
athāto rasabhedamadhyāyaṃ vyākhyāsyāmaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.3
doṣāṇyaṃ pañcadaśadhā prasaro bhihitas tu yaḥ |
triṣaṣṭi rasabhedānāṃ tatprayojanamucyate ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.4
avidagdhā vidagdhā vā bhidyante te triṣaṣṭidhā |
triṣaṣṭirasabhedāṃs tu vīkṣya tatra prayojayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.5
ekaikasyānugamanaṃ bhāgaśo yadudīritaḥ |
doṣāṇyaṃ tatra matimāṃ triṣaṣṭīnāṃ prayojayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.6
yathākramapravṛttānāṃ dvikeṣu madhuro rasaḥ |
pañcānukramate yogān amvlaś catura eva ca |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.7
trīṇyaitā gacchati raso lavaṇaḥ kaṭuko dvayaṃ |
tiktaḥ kaṣāyamanveti te dvikā daśa pañca ca ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.8
tadyathā | madhurāmvlau | madhuralavaṇau | madhurakaṭukau | madhuratiktau | madhurakaṣāyau | ete pañcānukrāntā madhureṇa || amvlalavaṇaḥ | amvlakaṭukaḥ | amvlatiktaḥ | amvlakaṣāyaḥ | te catvāro nukrāntā amvlena | lavaṇakaṭuḥ | lavaṇatiktaḥ | lavaṇakaṣāyaḥ | ete nukrāntās trayo lavaṇaina || kaṭutiktaḥ | kaṭukaṣāyaḥ | dvāv anukrāntau kaṭukena || tiktakaṣāyaḥ | eka evānukrāntas tiktaina || ete pañcadaśa dvikasaṃyogāḥ vyākhyātāḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.9
trikāna ta ūdhvaṃ vakṣyāmaḥ | ādau prayujyamānas tu madhuro daśa gacchati |
ṣaḍamvlo lavaṇas tasmād adham ekaṃ rasaḥ kaṭuḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.10
madhurāmvlakaṭuḥ | madhurāmvlatiktaḥ | madhurāmvlalavaṇakaṭuḥ | madhurāmvlalavaṇatiktaḥ | madhurāmvlalavaṇakaṣāyaḥ | madhurakaṭutiktaḥ | madhurakaṭutiktaḥ | madhurakaṭukaṣāyaḥ || madhuratiktakaṣāyaḥ | evam eteṣān daśānāṃ trikaśaṃyogānāṃ mādau madhuraḥ prayujyate || amvlalavaṇakaṭuḥ | amvlalavaṇatiktaḥ | amvlalavaṇakaṣāyaḥ | amvlakaṭutiktaḥ | amvlakaṭukaṣāyaḥ | amvlatiktakaṣāyaḥ |evam eṣāṃ ṣaṇṇyamādāv amvlaḥ prayujyate || lavaṇakaṭutiktaḥ | lavaṇakaṭukaṣāyaḥ | lavaṇatiktakaṣāyaḥ | evam eteṣāṃ trayāṇāmādau lavaṇaḥ prayujyate || kaṭutiktakaṣāyaḥ | evam eṣa eka evādau kaṭukaḥ | evam ete trikasaṃyogā viṃśatir vyākhyātāḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.11
catuṣkānata ūrdhvaṃ vakṣyāmaḥ |
catuṣkarasasaṃyoge madhuro daśa gacchati |
amvlacaturo yāti lavaṇastveka eva tu ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.12
madhurāmvlalavaṇakaṭukaḥ | madhurāmlalavaṇatiktaḥ | madhurāmvlalavaṇakaṣāyaḥ | madhurāmvlakaṭutiktaḥ | madhurāmvlakaṭukaṣāyaḥ | madhurāmvlatiktakaṣāyaḥ | madhuralavaṇakaṭutiktaḥ | madhuralavaṇakaṭukaṣāyaḥ | madhuralavaṇatiktakaṣāyaḥ | madhuralavaṇatiktakaṣāyaḥ | madhurakaṭutiktakaṣāyaḥ | evam eṣāṃ daśānāṃ catuṣkasaṃyogānāmādau madhuraḥ prayujyate || amvlalavaṇakaṭutiktaḥ | amvlalavaṇakaṭukaṣāyaḥ | amvlalavaṇatiktakaṣāyaḥ | amvlakaṭutiktakaṣāyaḥ | m eṣāṃ cartuṇṇāmādāvamvlaḥ | lavaṇakaṭutiktakaṣāyaḥ | evam eṣa eka evādau lavaṇaḥ | evam ete pañcadaśa catuṣkasaṃyogāḥ | pañcadaśa vyākhyātāḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.13
pañcakānata ūrdhvaṃ vakṣyāmaḥ ||
pañcakāṃ pañca madhuraḥ ṣaṭkamamvlas tu gacchati |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.14
madhurāmvlalavaṇakaṭutiktaḥ | madhurāmvlalavaṇakaṭukaṣāyaḥ | madhurāmvlalavaṇatiktakaṣāyaḥ | madhurāmlakaṭutiktakaṣāyaḥ | madhuralavaṇakaṭutiktakaṣāyaḥ | evam eṣāṃ madhurāmvlakaṭutiktakaṣāyaḥ || madhuralavaṅakaṭutiktakaṣāya iti || evam eṣāṃ pañcānāṃ pañcakasaṃyogānāmādau madhuraḥ prayujyate || amvlalavaṇakaṭutiktakaṣāyaḥ | evam ekasyādāv amvlaḥ | evam ete ṣaṭ pañcakāḥ vyākhyātāḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.15
ṣaṭkam ekam ata ūrdhvaṃ vakṣyāmaḥ || madhurāmvlalavaṇakaṭutiktakaṣāyaḥ | ekas tu evam ekaḥ ṣaṭkasaṃyogāḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.16
ekaikaśaś ca ṣad rasā bhavanti | prākāśyena | madhuraḥ | amvlaḥ | lavaṇaḥ | kaṭukaḥ | tiktaḥ | kaṣāyaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.63.17
evam ete triṣaṣṭirasayogāḥ vyākhyātāḥ |
doṣabhedāt | dviṣaṣṭyās te prayoktavyā vicakṣaṇair iti ||
kāyacikitsā || ||

div.head: [Adhyāya 64: draft edition based on MS K]
div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.1
athātaḥ svastharakṣaṇīyaṃ vyākhyāsyāmaḥ |

6.64.1.add
samadoṣaḥ samāgniś ca samadhātumalakriyaḥ |
prasannātmendriyamanāḥ svastha ity abhidhīyate ||

list.item: This verse is absent in the vulgate at this location, but occurs at SS.1.15.41.

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.3cd
tasya tad rakṣaṇaṃ vatsa cikitsāyāḥ paraṃ hitam |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.4
tasya yad vṛttam uktaṃ hi rakṣaṇañ ca mayāditaḥ |
tasminn arthaṃ samāsoktaṃ vistareṇeha vakṣyate ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.5
yasmin yasmin ṛtau ye ye doṣāḥ kupyanti dehinām |
teṣu teṣu pradātavyā rasās te te vijānatā ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.6
praklinnatvāc charīrāṇāṃ varṣāsu khalu dehinām |
mande 'gnau kopam āyānti saṃharṣān mārutādayaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.7
tasmāt kledaviśuddhyarthaṃ doṣasaṃdhāraṇāya ca |
kaṣāyatiktakaṭukai rasaiḥ saṃyuktam adravam ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.8
nātisnigdhaṃ nātirūkṣam uṣṇaṃ dīpanam eva ca |
deyam annaṃ nṛpataye yaj jalañ coktam āditaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.9
taptāyasakṛtāmbho vā pibet kṣaudrānvitañ ca yat |
ahni varṣānilāviṣṭe 'tyarthaśītāmbusaṃkule |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.10
taruṇatvād vidāhañ ca gacchanty auṣadhayas tathā |
tannimittañ ca matimān nātivyāyāmam ācaret ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.11a
nātiśīte purāṇās tu yavagodhūmaśālayaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.11b
yūṣaiḥ sūpaiś ca kaṭubhir bhojyā hṛdyaiś ca jāṅgalaiḥ ||

list.item: On the basis of Carakasaṃhitā, Sūtrasthāna 6.38c (see the next note), we have emended bhojyair (K and N) to bhojyā to restore the syntax.

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.11c
mādhvīkaṃ sīdhum alpam vā māhendram atha sārasam |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.11d
taptaśītaṃ kṣaudrayutaṃ kaupajam vā pibej jalam ||

list.item: Cf. Carakasaṃhitā, Sūtrasthāna 6.38–39: agnisaṃrakṣaṇavatā yavagodhūmaśālayaḥ| purāṇā jāṅgalair māṃsair bhojyā yūṣaiś ca saṃskṛtaiḥ|| pibet kṣaudrānvitaṃ cālpaṃ mādhvīkāriṣṭam ambu vā| māhendraṃ taptaśītaṃ vā kaupaṃ sārasam eva vā||

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.11e
pūrvānilaṃ gharmasevām udamanthaṃ sarijjalam |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.13ab
divāsvapnam avaśyāyaṃ varjayec cātra maithunam ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.13a
pragharṣodvarttanasnānagandhasragdhūmasevitā |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.13b
bhūmyuṣmaparihārārthaṃ svapet madhyamaveśmani |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.12ab
śīte sāgnau nivāte ca guruprāvaraṇānvitaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.12a
kṣate kledādidoṣāṃś ca varjayec chattrasamvṛtaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.12cd
yāyān nāgavadhūbhiś ca praśastāgurubhūṣita iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16a
vyapanītadharābhogaghananīlāvaguṇṭhite |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16b
vyomni prasannadiṅmārgalabdhaprasarabhāskare |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16c
śakrāstralabdhasandarśajāyamānoddhate namaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16d
ākrāmati raver lakṣmīs tiraskṛtya ghanaṃ ghanam |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16e
varṣāsu sañcitam pittam auṣṇyāc charadi kupyati |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16f
tasmāt pittaghnaṃ seveta sarva eva ghanātyaye ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16g
śītaṃ kaṣāyamadhuram īṣallaghu satiktakam ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16h
sasarpir jāṅgalayutaṃ śarady adyāt prakāṃkṣataḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16i
hariṇān pṛṣatān lāvāñ chagān eṇān kapiñjalān ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16j
mudgāñ chālīn yavāñ jīrṇṇān seven nātivyavāyavān |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16k
vidāhi kṣāratīkṣṇoṣṇaṃ divāsvapnaṃ gurūṇy atha |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16l
śākaṃ guru ca yat māṃsam avaśyāyañ ca varjayet |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.16m
sevyaḥ śaradi yatnena vidhir eṣa vijānatā |
drākṣekṣukṣīrasevī ca bhavet tatra narādhipa |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.17ab
varṣāsu sañcitam pittaṃ nirharec ca virecanaiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.17a
tiktasarpiḥprayogair vā sirāṇāñ cāpi mokṣaṇaiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.18cd
svāduśītañ jalaṃ medhyaṃ śucisphaṭikanirmalam |

list.item: In the vulgate, the verses from svāduśītajalaṃ to samācared, with the exception of two hemistiches (śaratsu pavanañ caiva kamalotpalaśāliṣu and candrapādāḥ sahṛdvargaḥ sukhāni madhurāgiraḥ), have been included in round brackets with a footnote stating, ``This passage is not found in the hand-written manuscripts.'' Also, Ḍalhaṇa does not comment on these verses.

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.19
śaraccandrāṃśunirdhūtam agastyodayanirviṣam |
prasannatvāc ca salilaṃ sarvam eva tadā hitam |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.19a
śaratsu pavanañ caiva kamalotpalaśāliṣu |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.64.20
candanaṃ vā sakarpūraṃ vāsaś cāmalinaṃ laghu |

div.head: [Adhyāya 65: draft edition based on MS K]
[Adhyāya 65]
div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.1
athātas tantrayuktyuddeśaṃ nāmādhyāyaṃ vyākhyāsyāmaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.3
tatra dvātriṃśat tantrayuktayo bhavanti |
tad yathā | adhikaraṇam | yogaḥ | padārthaḥ | hetvarthaḥ | uddeśaḥ | nirdeśaḥ | upadeśaḥ | apadeśaḥ | pradeśaḥ | atideśaḥ | apavargaḥ | vākyaśeṣaḥ | arthāpattiḥ | viparyayaḥ | prasaṅgaḥ | ekāntaḥ | anekāntaḥ | pūrvapakṣaḥ | nirṇṇayaḥ | anumatam | vidhānam | anāgatāpekṣaṇam | atikrāntāpekṣaṇaṃ | saṃśayaḥ | vyākhyānam | svasaṃjñā | nirvacanam | nidarśanam | niyogaḥ | vikalpaḥ | samuccayaḥ | ūhyam iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.4
atrāha | āsāṃ yuktīnāṃ kiṃ prayojanam | ucyate | vākyayojanam arthayojanañ ca ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.5
ślokau cātra bhavataḥ ||
asadvādiprayuktānāṃ śabdānāṃ pratiṣedhanam |
svavākyasiddhir api ca kriyate tantrayuktibhiḥ ||

list.item: We have adopted the vulgate reading here, although it is highly unlikely to be original. In MS H, this pāda appears to read asadaprayuktānāñ ca. This is unmetrical, the compound is unusual, and there is an unexplained ca. There have been interventions in MS K by a second hand, and also there is a hole in the manuscript just at this point. The ante correctionem reading of K is unclear but appears to be closer to the reading of H than to the vulgate reading. These factors make it hard to reconstruct what a plausible and correct older reading might have been. For the impact on the meaning of this text, see notes to the translation.

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.6
vyatyāsoktās tu ye hy arthā līnā ye cāpy anirmalāḥ |
leśoktā ye ca kecit syus teṣāñ cāpi prasādhanam ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.8
tatra yam artham adhikṛtyocyate tad adhikaraṇam | yathā rasaṃ doṣaṃ vā ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.9
yena vākyaṃ yujyate sa yogaḥ | yathā vyatyāsenoktānāṃ sannikṛṣṭaviprakṛṣṭānāṃ padārthānām ekīkaraṇam ||
tailaṃ pibec cāmṛtavalli nimba vilva
haṃsāhvayā hiṃsrābhayā vṛkṣakapippalībhiḥ |
siddhaṃ balābhyāñ ca sadevadāru hitāya nityaṃ galagaṇḍaroge ||
siddhaṃ pibed iti prathamaṃ vaktavye dvitīye pāde tṛtīyapāde
siddhaṃ siddham iti prayuktam |
evan dūrasthānām api padārthānām ekīkaraṇaṃ yogaḥ ||

list.item: The sentence, yathā... ekīkaraṇam , does not appear in the vulgate but an almost identical reading appears in Ḍalhana's commentary on this section.

Suśrutasaṃhitā 4.18.47. For this section in the Cikitsāsthāna there is only one witness viz., H, in the Nepalese version. It has a minor variant reading in the second line. Instead of siddhaṃ balābhyāṃ ca sadevadāru, it reads siddhaṃ balābhyāṃ sahadevadāru. The variant reading in the vulgate as °hiṃsrābhayā° instead of haṃsāhvayā is not found in the actual occurrence of the verse in the Cikitsāsthāna, where it is identical with its reading of the tantrayukti section in the Nepalese version. The following quote from Vṛnda's Siddhayoga also supports the reading of the Nepalese recension and the reading in the Citkitsāsthāna of the vulgate. Siddhayoga 41.10: tailaṃ pibec cāmṛtavallinimbahaṃsāhvayāvṛkṣakapippalībhiḥ | siddhaṃ balābhyāṃ ca sadevadāru hitāya nityaṃ galagaṇḍaroge ||

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.10
yo 'rtho 'bhihitaḥ sūtre pade vā sa padārthaḥ | padasya padayoḥ padānāṃ vā yo 'rthaḥ sa padārthaḥ |
aparimitāś ca padārthāḥ |
yatra tu sneha svedābhyañjaneṣu svedāñjaneṣu nirddiṣṭeṣu dvayos trayāṇāṃ vārthānām upapattir dṛśyate tatra yo 'rthaḥ pūrvāparayoga siddho bhavati | sa grahītavyaḥ | yathā vedotpattim adhyāyaṃ vyākhyāsyāma ity ukte sandihyate buddhiḥ katamasya vedasyotpattiṃ vakṣyati vivakṣur iti | sāmavedādayaś ca ṛgvedādayas tu vedāḥ | pūrvāparam upalakṣya pūrvāpara yogam upalabhya
vinda vida vid vicāraṇe vid vindati ity etayoś ca dhātvor ekārthaḥ anekārthayoḥ prayogaḥ | paścāt padam pratipattir bhavati āyurvedotpattim ayaṃ vivakṣur iti eṣa evaṃ padārthaḥ |

list.item: Jadavji notes a variant reading sūtrapade in the vulgate.

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.11
yad uktaṃ sādhanaṃ yad anyad uktam anyārthasādhakaṃ bhavati sa hetvarthaḥ |
yathā mṛtpiṇḍo 'dbhiḥ praklidyate tathā māṣa dugdha mudga prabhṛtibhir vraṇaḥ klidyate ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.12
samāsa vacanaṃ kathanam
samuddeśaḥ uddeśaḥ |
yathā śalyam iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.13
vistaravacanaṃ nirdeśaḥ |
yathā śārīram āgantu ceti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.14
evam ity upadeśaḥ |
yathā rātrau na jāgṛyād divā na supyād tathā na jāgṛyād rātrau divāsvapnañ ca varjayet iti ||

list.item: We read against witness K because the text never uses the second person in medical injunctions.

div.l:
cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.15
anena kāraṇenety apadeśaḥ |
yathāpadiśyate madhureṇa śleṣmābhivardhata iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.16
prakṛtasyātikrāntena sādhanaṃ pradeśaḥ |
yathā devadattasyānena śalyam uddhṛtaṃ yajñadattasyāyam tasmād yajñadattasyāpy ayam eva uddhariṣyatīti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.17
prakṛtasyānāgatena sādhanam atideśaḥ |
yathā yady asya vāyur ūrdhvam uttiṣṭhati | tenodāvarttī syād iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.18
abhipramṛjyāpakarṣaṇam apavargaḥ |
yathā asvedyā viṣopasṛṣṭā anyatra mūtrakīṭaviṣād iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.19
yena padenānuktena vākyaṃ samāpyate sa vākyaśeṣaḥ |
yathā śiraḥpāṇipādapṛṣṭhapārśvodaravān ity ukte puruṣagrahaṇaṃ vināpi gamyate puruṣa evokta iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.20
yad akīrttitam arthād āpadyate sārthāpattiḥ |
yathā odanaṃ bhokṣyāmahety ukte arthād āpannaṃ bhavati nāyaṃ pipāsur yavāgūm iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.21
yady asya prātilomyaṃ tad viparyayaḥ |
yathā kṛśolpaprāṇabhīravo duścikitsyā ity ukte viparītaṃ gṛhyate dṛḍhādayaḥ sucikitsyā iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.22
prakaraṇāntareṇa samānaḥ prasaṅgaḥ |
yathādhikaraṇāntarito yo 'rtho 'sakṛd asakṛd uktaḥ samāpyate sarvatra ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.23
yad avadhāraṇenocyate sa ekāntaḥ |
yathā trivṛtā virecayati madanaphalaṃ vāmayati ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.24
kvacit tathā kvacid anyathā so 'nekāntaḥ |
yathā kecid ācāryā bruvate dravyam pradhānaṃ kecid rasāḥ kecid vīryaṃ kecid vipāka iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.25
yas tu niḥsaṃśayam abhidhīyate sa pūrvapakṣaḥ |
yathā kathaṃ vātanimittāś catvāraḥ pramehā asādhyā bhavanti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.26
tasyottaraṃ nirṇṇayaḥ |
yathā śarīraṃ prapīḍya praścyotayitvādho gatvā vasāmedomajjānuviddhaṃ mūtraṃ sṛjati evam asādhyā vātajāḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.28
paramatam apratiṣiddham anumatam |
yathā yo brūyāt ṣaḍ rasā iti vādī tac ca prati pratipādyānumanyate kathaṃcit tad anumatan nāma ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.29
prakaraṇānupūrvyād abhihitaṃ vidhānam |
yathā sakthimarmāṇy ekādaśa prakaraṇānupūrvyābhihitāni ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.30
evaṃ vakṣyatīty anāgatāpekṣaṇam |
yathā ślokasthāne brūyāc cikitsyeṣu vakṣyāmīti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.31
ity uktam ity atikrāntāpekṣaṇam |
yathā cikitsiteṣu brūyāt, ślokasthāne yad abhihitam iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.32
ubhayahetunidarśanaṃ saṃśayaḥ |
yathā talahṛdayaghātaḥ prāṇaharaḥ pāṇipādacchedanam aprāṇaharam ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.33
tatrātiśayopavarṇanaṃ vyākhyānam |
yatheha pañcaviṃśakaḥ puruṣo vyākhyāyate | tathā nānyeṣv āyurvedatantreṣu bhūtādiṃ pratyārabdhaṃś cintā iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.34
anyaśāstrāsāmānyā svasaṃjñā | sveṣu tantreṣu saṃjñā yā sā svasañjñā |
yatheha śāstre mithunam iti madhusarpiṣor grahaṇaṃ trivṛtam iti sarpistailavasām ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.35
lokaprathitam udāharaṇaṃ nirvacanam | yathoṣṇabhayāc chāyām anusarati ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.36
dṛṣṭāntavyaktir nidarśanam | yathā agnir vāyusahitaḥ kakṣe 'bhivṛddhiṃ gacchati tathā vātapittakaphaduṣṭo vraṇo 'bhivṛddhiṃ gacchatīti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.37
idam eveti niyogaḥ | yathā pathyam eva bhoktavyam iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.39
idaṃ cedañ ceti vikalpaḥ | yathā māṃsavarge eṇahariṇalāvatittirāḥ pradhānā iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.38
saṃkṣepavacanaṃ samuccayaḥ | yathā rasodanaḥ kṣīrodaṇaḥ saghṛtā vā yavāgūr bhavatv iti ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.65.40
yad anirdiṣṭaṃ buddhigamyan tad ūhyam |
yathā abhihitam annapānavidhau caturvidham annapānaṃ bhakṣyaṃ bhojyaṃ lehyaṃ peyam iti | evaṃ caturvidhe vaktavye dvividham abhihitaṃ || atrohyaṃ bhavati annapāne viśiṣṭe dvayor grahaṇe caturṇṇām api grahaṇaṃ bhavati ||
kiñ cānyat anne bhakṣyam aviruddhaṃ ghanasādharmyāt | peye lehyaṃ dravasādharmyāt | caturvidhas tv āhāraḥ praviralaḥ | prāyeṇa dvividha eva | ato dvitvam prasiddham ity āha bhagavān dhanvantariḥ |

list.item: Note the citation here of Dhanvantari's name as an authority on food. Cf. Suśrutasaṃhitā Sūtrasthāna 46.3 in which Dhanvantari is the teacher of the topic of food and drink. See also J. Birch, D. Wujastyk et. al. (2021), "Further Insight into the Role of Dhanvantari," p.3 (DOI https://doi.org/10/hbph78).

div.l: iti kāyacikitsā 29

div.head: [Adhyāya 66: draft edition based on MS K]
[Adhyāya 66]
div.l: athāto doṣabhedavikalpam adhyāyaṃ vyākhyāsyāmaḥ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.3
aṣṭāṅgāyurvedavidaṃ kāśirājam mahīpatiṃ |
cchinnaśāstrārthasandehaṃ sūkṣmāgādhamivodadhiṃ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.4
viśvāmitrasutaḥ śrīmāṃ suśrutaḥ paripṛcchati ||
dviṣaṣṭirdoṣabhedā ye purastātparikīrttitāḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.5
kati tatraikaśo jñeyā viṃśo vāpy athavā triśaḥ |
tasya tad vacanaṃ śrutvā saṃśayacchinmahātapāḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.6
prītātmā nṛpaśārdūla suśrutāyāha tattvataḥ |
trayo doṣā dhātavaś ca pūrīśaṃ mūtram eva ca |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.7
dehaṃ sandhārayanty ete hy avyāpannā rasair hitaiḥ |
puruṣaḥ ṣoḍaṣakalaḥ prāṇāś caikādaśaiva ye |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.8ab
rogāṇāñ ca sahasraṃ yac chata viṃśatir eva ca |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.9
vyāsataḥ kīrttitan tadvibhinnā doṣāsu yo guṇāḥ |
dviṣaṣṭidhā bhavanty ete bhūyiṣṭham iti niścayaḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.10
traya eva pṛthag doṣāḥ dviśo nava samādhikāḥ |
trayodaśādhikaikadvihīnamadhyordhvalakṣaṇaiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.11
tribhir pañcāśad etan tu sahaivaṃ kṣayam āgataiḥ |
hīnamadhyādhikādvekakṣīṇavṛddhās tathāpare

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.12
dvādaśaiva samākhyātā rogayonir dviṣaṣṭidhā |
miśrā dhātumalairaiva yānty asaṃkhyeyatām api |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.13
tasmāt prasaṃgaṃ saṃyamya doṣabhedavikalpanaiḥ |
rogaṃ viditvopacared rasabhedair yathe ritaiḥ |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.14
bhiṣak karttātha karaṇaṃ rasā doṣāś ca kāraṇaṃ ||
kāryam ārogyam evaikam anārogyam athāpi vā |

6.66.14a
taśmāt sādhu viditvetāṃ rasadoṣavikalpaṇāṃ | .
bhiṣajabheṣajaṃ kāryaṃ prāṇyaṃ hanyan yathā kṛtāṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.15
adhyāyānāñ catuḥṣaṣṭyā grathitārthapadakramaṃ |
etad eva viśeṣeṇa tantram uttaram ṛddhimat |

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.16
spaṣṭagūḍhārthagambhīram agāḍhaṃ mandacetasāṃ |
yathākramaṃ yathāpraśnaṃ yathātatvaṃ yathāvidhiṃ |
yathāpratijñañ ca mayā bhavatāṃ parikīrttitaṃ ||

cf. 1938 ed. 6.66.17
sahottaran tv etad adhītya
tantraṃ svāyaṃbhuvaṃ taṃ vidhi kīrttitena |
na hīyate 'rthāṃ manaso 'bhyupetād
evaṃ vaco brāhmyam atīva satyam iti || ❈ ||

list.item: This is the end of the vulgate text.

div.l:
6.66.17.add
mūtradoṣo mūtrāghāto yonyamānuṣam eva ca ||
apasmāronmādakañ caiva rasabhedas tathaiva ca
svastharakṣāvidhāṇañ ca tantrayuktiś ca doṣabhit |
ity ebhir daśakaṃ proktaṃ punaḥ kāyacikitsite || ❈ ||

6.66.trailer1
iti sauśrute sahottaratantraṃ catuḥṣaṣṭitamo 'dhyāyaḥ samāptaḥ || ❈ ||

list.item: Note that the chapter colophon of witness H clearly calls this the end of chapter 64, not 66. Cf. the Nepalese reading of 6.66.15, which also refers to 64 chapters.

div.l:
6.66.trailer2
samāptañ cedaṃ sahottaratantram ity ato nighaṇṭur bhaviṣyati || ❈ ||

div.head: [Colophon]
div.l:
6.66.colophon1
rājye śrīmānadeve pṛthusitayaśasi prodyadinduprakāśe
kāle puṇyārjjanasya sakalajanamanohlādiramye vasante
varṣe caikottare 'smiṃs tritayaśatagate mādhave māsi śukle
saptamyāṃ puṣya ṛkṣe daśaśatakiraṇe vāsare siddhayoge |

6.66.colophon2
utpattyādyambuvelākulavividharujagrāhajuṣṭātiraudre
saṃsāre sāgare 'smiñ jagad idam akhilaṃ glāninam sampravīkṣya
tasmāc chrīharṣacandro niratiśayaghṛṇābhāvito moktukāmaḥ
prītyā caigaṃ prākhilat suśrutākhyam |

list.item: It is hard to understand how a word ending in -gaṃ, or any accusative, could precede prākhilat or even pra akhilan. Some readers have emended prākhilat to prālikhat, a rare verb, but one that at least governs the accusative. We do not see metathesis elsewhere in the work of K's scribe, which is generally very accurate, so we consider the emendation unlikely. With so many words missing from this passage, we consider that emendation is not useful.

We read -harṣacandro which could be the name of the scribe. But the following nnirati- is hard to construe. If we read the ablative -harṣacandrān, it solves the problem of -nn- but is also hard to construe.

div.l:
6.66.colophon3
śrīgaṇadevadevakuladūnī gvalakanivāsino vaidyavasuvarmaṇaḥ pustakam idaṃ paṭhitvārtham avagamya sarvasattvānām upadeśaṃ vidhātuṃ pratipāditam | atas tad ādhikrayābhyāṃ tad gotrajena kenacin na kañcid dātavyam | yadā nopakriyate tadāsmān eva pratyarpaṇīyam iti ||

rdgGrp.lem: āmādhyaśanaśīlasya kaphapittapradūṣitaṃ | srotobhir bastim āgamya mūtraṃ vyāpādayed atha
rdgGrp.rdg: āmādhyaśanaśīlasya kaphapittapradūṣitaṃ | srotobhir bastim āgamya mūtraṃ vyāpādayed atha

āmādhyaśanaśīlasya, kaphapittapradūṣitaṃ | srotobhir bbastim āga
mya mūtraṃ vyāpādayed atha

rdgGrp.lem: vivarṇṇam āvilaṃ sāṃdraṃ kṛcchrād api ca tad bhavet | tato vegapratīghātād udāvarttena vāyunā
rdgGrp.rdg:
vivarṇṇam āvilaṃ sāṃdraṃ kṛcchrād api ca tad bhavet | tato vegapratīghātād udāvarttena vā
yunā

app.rdg: vivarṇṇam āvilan sāndraṃ kṛcchrād api ca tad bhavet | tato vegapratīghātād udāvarttena vāyunā
vedanā ca parā bastau vātāṣṭhīleti tāṃ

rdgGrp.lem: pibet kṣīran tatas tan tu mūtrakṛcchraharan naraḥ
rdgGrp.rdg: pibet kṣīran tatas tan tu mūtrakṛcchraharan naraḥ

app.rdg: pibet kṣaret tatas tan tu, mūtrakṛcchraṃ haran naraḥ
nalāśmabhedadarbhekṣutrapusair vārubījakān | kṣīre pariśṛtān tatra pibet sarpiḥ samāyutān
pāṭalyā yāvaśūkāc ca pāribhadrāt tilād api | kṣārodakena matimān tvageloṣaṇacūrṇakam
pibed guḍena miśraṃ vā lihyāllehān pṛthak pṛthak | ata ūrdhvaṃ pravakṣyāmi mūtradoṣe kramaṃ hitam
snehasvedopapannānāṃ hitaṃ teṣu virecanam | tataḥ saṃśuddhadehānāṃ hitāś cottarabastayaḥ
strīṇāmatiprasaṅgena śoṇitaṃ yasya dṛśyate | maithunoparamas tasya bṛṃhaṇaś ca vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ
tāmracūḍavasā tailaṃ hitaṃ cottarabastiṣu | vidhānaṃ tasya pūrvaṃ hi vyāsataḥ parikīrtitam
kṣaudrārdhapātraṃ dattvā ca pātraṃ tu kṣīrasarpiṣaḥ | śarkarāyāś ca cūrṇaṃ ca drākṣācūrṇaṃ ca tatsamam
svayaṅguptāphalaṃ caiva tathivekṣurakasya ca | pippalīcūrṇasaṃyuktamardhabhāgaṃ prakalpayet
tadaikadhyaṃ samānīya khajenābhipramanthayet | tataḥ pāṇitalaṃ cūrṇaṃ līḍhvā kṣīraṃ tataḥ pibet
etat sarpiḥ prayuñjānaḥ śuddhadeho naraḥ sadā | mūtradoṣāñjayet sarvānanyayogaiḥ sudurjayān
jayec choṇitadoṣāṃś ca vandhyā garbhaṃ labheta ca | nārī caitat prayuñjānā yonidosāt pramucyate
balā kolāsthi madhukaṃ śvadaṃṣṭrātha śatāvarī | mṛṇālaṃ ca kaśeruś ca bījānīkṣurakasya ca
sahasravīryāṃśumatī payasyā saha kālayā | śṛgālavinnātibalā bṛṃhaṇīyo gaṇas tathā
etāni samabhāgāni matimān saha sādhayet | caturguṇena payasā guḍasya tulayā saha
droṇāvaśiṣṭaṃ tat pūtaṃ pacettena ghṛtāḍhakam | tat siddhaṃ kalaśe sthāpyaṃ kṣaudraprasthena saṃyutam
sarpiretat prayuñjāno mūtradoṣāt pramucyate | tugākṣīryāś ca cūrṇāni śarkarāyās tathaiva ca
kṣaudreṇa tulyānyāloḍya praśaste 'hani lehayet | tasya khādedyathāśakti mātrāṃ kṣīraṃ tataḥ pibet
śukradoṣāñjayenmartyaḥ prāśya samyak suyantritaḥ | vyavāyakṣīṇaretās tu sadyaḥ saṃlabhate sukham
ojasvī balavānmartyaḥ piben neva ca hṛṣyati | citrakaḥ sārivā caiva balā kālānusārivā
drākṣā viśālā pippalyas tathā citraphalā bhevet | tathaiva madhukaṃ pathyāṃ dadyādāmalakāni ca
ghṛtāḍhakaṃ pacedebhiḥ kalkaiḥ karṣasamanvitaiḥ | kṣīradroṇe jaladroṇe tat siddham avatārayet
śītaṃ parisrutaṃ caiva śarkarāprasthasaṃyutam | tugākṣīryāś ca tat sarvaṃ matimān parimiśrayet
tato mitaṃ pibetkāle yathādoṣaṃ yathābalam | vātaretāḥ śleṣmaretāḥ pittaretās tu yo bhavet
raktaretā granthiretāḥ pibed icchan naro gatām | jīvanīyaṃ ca vṛṣyaṃ ca sarpir etad balāvaham
prakṣāhitaṃ ca dhanyaṃ ca sarvarogāpahaṃ śivam | sarpir etat prayuñjānā strī garbhaṃ labhate 'cirāt
asṛgdoṣāñ jayec cāpi yonidoṣāṃś ca saṃhatān | mūtradoṣeṣu sarveṣu kuryād etac cikitsitam
iti suśrutasaṃhitāyām uttaratantrāntargate kāyacikitsātantre mūtrāghātapratiṣedho nāma (viṃśo 'dhyāyaḥ, āditaḥ) aṣṭapañcāśattamo 'dhyāyaḥ
uttaratantre ṣaṭpañcāśattamaḥ kāyacikitsāyāṃ mūtradoṣacikitsā ekaviṃśatitamo dhyāyaḥ || ❈

rdgGrp.lem: ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi mūtrāghātacikitsitaṃ | kāryaṃ bhaved yathā yac ca śṛṇu kīrttayato mama
rdgGrp.rdg:
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyā
mi mūtrāghātacikitsitaṃ | kāryaṃ bhaved yathā yac ca śṛṇu kīrttayato mama

ataḥ param pra
vakṣyāmi mūtrāghātacikitsitaṃ | kāryam bhaved yathā yac ca, śṛṇu kīrttayato mama

rdgGrp.lem: kaṣāyāny tha kalkāś ca lehāḥ svedās tathaiva ca | hitā syur mūtraghāteṣu tathaivottarabastayaḥ
rdgGrp.rdg: kaṣāyāny tha kalkāś ca lehāḥ svedās tathaiva ca | hitā syur mūtraghāteṣu tathaivottarabastayaḥ

app.rdg:
kaṣāyāśyathakalkāś ca lehāḥ svedās tathaiva ca | hitāḥ syur mmūtraghāteṣu tathaivottaraba
stayaḥ

rdgGrp.lem: ervvārubījakalkaḥ syāc chlakṣṇapiṣṭaukṣasammitaḥ | dhānyāmlbapeyo lavaṇo mūtrāghātena pīḍitaḥ
rdgGrp.rdg: ervvārubījakalkaḥ syāc chlakṣṇapiṣṭaukṣasammitaḥ | dhānyāmlbapeyo lavaṇo mūtrāghātena pīḍitaḥ

app.rdg: ervvārubījakalkaḥ syāc chlakṣṇapiṣṭaukasammitaḥ | dhānyāmlapeyo lavaṇo mūtrāghātena pīḍitaḥ

rdgGrp.lem: surāṃ sauvarcalavatīm pradhānāṃ prapiben naraḥ | jīrṇṇabhuktaḥ sadā bhuñjaṃ saguḍaṃ śāntim arcchati
rdgGrp.rdg: surāṃ sauvarcalavatīm pradhānāṃ prapiben naraḥ | jīrṇṇabhuktaḥ sadā bhuñjaṃ saguḍaṃ śāntim arcchati

app.rdg:

tathā coktam kṛtsnaṃ śarīraṃ niṣpīḍya medomajjāvasāyutaḥ | adhaḥ prakupyate vāyus tenāsādhyās tu vātajāḥ

rdgGrp.lem: anyaśāstrāsāmānyā svasaṃjñā | sveṣu tantreṣu saṃjñā yā sā
rdgGrp.rdg: anyaśāstrāsāmānyā svasaṃjñā | sveṣu tantreṣu saṃjñā yā sā

app.rdg: anyaśāstrāsāmānyā svajñā ṣu tantreṣu saṃjñā yā
yathā āyur vidyate 'sminn anena vā āyur vindatīty āyurvedaḥ

rdgGrp.rdg:
saghṛtā vā yavāgūr bhavatv i
ti

rdgGrp.lem: kiñ cānyat anne bhakṣyam aviruddhaṃ ghanasādharmyāt | peye lehyaṃ dravasādharmyāt | caturvidhas
rdgGrp.rdg:
kiñ cānyat anne bhakṣyam aviruddhaṃ ghanasādharmyāt | peye lehyaṃ dravasādharmyāt | ca
turvidhas

app.rdg: kiñcānyena anne bhakṣyam aviruddhad yena sādharmmyāt | caturvvidhas
kiñ cānyat annena bhakṣyam avaruddhaṃ, ghanasādharmyāt; peyena lehyaṃ, dravasādhamyāt
bhavanti cātra sāmānyadarśanenāsāṃ vyavasthā saṃpradarśitā | viśeṣas tu yathāyogam upadhāryo vipaś citā
dvātriṃśadyuktayo hy etās tantrasāragaveṣaṇe | mayā samyag vinihitāḥ śabdārthanyāyasaṃyutāḥ
yo hy etā vidhivad vetti dīpībhūtās tu buddhimān | sa pūjārho bhiṣakśreṣṭha iti dhanvantarer matam
iti suśrutasaṃhitāyām uttaratantre tantrabhūṣaṇādhyāyeṣu tantrayuktir nāma (tṛtīyo 'dhyāyaḥ, āditaḥ) pañcaṣaṣṭitamo 'dhyāyaḥ

app.lem: cedaṃ sahottaratantram ity ato nighaṇṭur bhaviṣyati || ❈
app.rdg: cedaṃ sahottaratantram ity ato nighaṇṭur bhabhaviṣyati || ❈
